creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Let's clean up Bugzilla right away. Michael, if the issue were to persist after the commit in a previous comment aka in version 3.1.0_1, please provide new findings and reopen this PR.

As a remark, I found the newly-linked https://github.com/OpenVPN/easy-rsa/issues/566 (from their ticket #589 under See Also) quite elucidating.
